task: Fix a TypeError crash in the MCP toolkit's JSON-Schema-to-Pydantic converter when a $defs entry references a sibling definition declared later in the same map, via a two-pass placeholder pre-registration in _process_definitions.

technical_risk.label: M
technical_risk.risk_factors: Shared core utility used by all MCP tool schema conversions; fix depends on ordering-sensitive cache/placeholder resolution logic (self-reference vs. forward sibling reference degrade differently to Any); regression risk spans every MCP tool that has $defs/$definitions with cross-references
technical_risk.mitigation: Two-pass pre-registration reuses the existing Any-placeholder pattern already accepted for self-references, rather than introducing a new mechanism; two new regression tests lock in forward-sibling-ref resolution and pre-existing self-ref-in-own-body behavior; one round of code review approved with no blocking findings; qa-gates passed

key_reasoning.reason: Fix touches ordering-sensitive cache/placeholder resolution logic in a shared utility used by every MCP tool schema conversion; regression blast radius is wide even though the change itself is small and well-tested
Single function fix (_process_definitions), but json_schema_utils.py is a core shared utility, triggering the 'touches core shared utilities' red flag
3 files touched (1 source + 2 pre-existing test files extended), spanning src/ and tests/ -- matches the S calibration anchor (validation-to-form-field example: 3 files, 2 dirs, S)

red_flags_applied: Component Scope bumped from XS to S: touches core shared utility (json_schema_utils.py used across MCP tool schema conversion)
